mock.name: Lat Pulldown Machine
mock.description: The lat pulldown machine strengthens your back, especially the latissimus dorsi. It performs a downward pulling motion.
mock.step1: Sit on the seat and tuck your knees under the pad
mock.step2: Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder width
mock.step3: Pull down slowly toward your chest
mock.step4: Guide your elbows back and down
mock.tip1: Avoid starting with too heavy a weight
mock.tip2: Focus on squeezing your back muscles
mock.tip3: Keep good posture — don't lean back too far
mock.tip4: Use full range of motion on each rep
